description_long: This object is a weathered stone obelisk set on a rectangular base, accompanied by several broken and toppled stone slabs. The front face of the obelisk features a recessed panel with a sculpted relief portrait and an inscription below, both showing signs of age and erosion. The stone surface is rough and irregular, with visible chips and discoloration, suggesting significant exposure to the elements. Around the obelisk, patches of green vegetation and grass are growing, partially covering some of the fallen stones. The base is uneven, with some stones displaced and leaning against the main structure. The overall appearance is that of a historic monument or grave marker, likely found in a park or cemetery.
description: A weathered stone obelisk with a relief portrait and inscription on its front, surrounded by broken slabs and overgrown grass.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the obelisk from the side, highlighting the rough stone texture, toppled slabs, and dense grass at the base.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the obelisk from a rear angle, emphasizing the tall, narrow shaft and the scattered, broken stones behind it.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the front of the obelisk, featuring the relief portrait, inscription, and the most intact view of the base and surrounding greenery.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the obelisk from the opposite side, focusing on the vertical shaft and the arrangement of fallen stones and grass.
attribute_inscription: There is an inscription in the recessed panel on the front face, below the relief portrait. The text is in a serif style, likely English, but is partially eroded and difficult to read.
attribute_ornamentation: A sculpted relief portrait is present in the upper section of the front panel, framed by a shallow arch. No other decorative motifs are visible.
attribute_base_design: The base consists of a rectangular stone platform with several displaced and broken stone slabs around it. Some slabs are leaning against the obelisk, and the base is partially overgrown with grass.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is flat and rough, lacking any decorative features or pointed finish.
attribute_surrounding_features: Surrounding the obelisk are broken stone slabs, patches of grass, and low vegetation, giving the area an overgrown and neglected appearance.
